fields.Name: Sonar: Preview Model
fields.Description: Computes engagement scores for a Sonar model WITHOUT persisting them and returns a band distribution + a sample-member breakdown. Read-only; safe on a draft model. Backs the Model Builder live preview / Simulate.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel ID to preview.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { totalScored, bandDistribution[], sampleMember }.
Preview computed.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The engine failed to compute scores.

fields.Name: Sonar: Recompute Model
fields.Description: Computes AND persists a full scoring run for a Sonar model (records a ScoreRecomputeRun, upserts Scores + contributions). Requires a published model (a Score must reference the version that produced it).

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel ID to recompute (must be published).

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { runId, status, recordsScored }.
Recompute succeeded.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The recompute run failed (e.g. model not published).

fields.Name: Sonar: Validate Factor
fields.Description: Evaluates an unsaved draft declarative factor over the live population WITHOUT persisting, returning a representative member's raw value + normalized strength. Backs the Factor Builder live preview; read-only, safe on a draft model.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel ID the draft factor belongs to.

fields.Name: DraftJSON
fields.Description: JSON of the draft factor: { sourceRelatedEntityID, aggregation, aggregateFieldName?, filterExpression?, timeWindowID?, normalizationMethod, higherIsBetter }.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { membersWithData, sampleAnchorId, sampleRawValue, sampleStrength }.
Preview computed.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The engine failed to evaluate the draft factor.

fields.Name: Sonar: Member Activity Streak
fields.Description: Action-backed factor: returns a member's current consecutive-month activity streak (months in an unbroken run ending at AsOf that each had >=1 activity row). Deterministic, read-only; the first reference Action-backed factor (see plans/action-factors.md).

fields.Name: AnchorRecordID
fields.Description: The anchor record id (member id) to score, injected by the scoring engine.

fields.Name: AsOf
fields.Description: As-of date (ISO), injected by the engine; defaults to now.

fields.Name: Value
fields.Description: Output: the current consecutive-month streak (integer).
Streak computed.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The streak computation failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: List Factor Actions
fields.Description: Returns the catalog of factor-actions (MJ Actions following the Sonar factor contract) with each action's self-described contract — what it measures, the entities it reads, its output meaning, and cost profile — plus its configurable params. Backs the Model Builder 'custom signal' picker. Read-only.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON array of factor-actions: { actionId, name, description, contract, params[] }.
Catalog returned.
Failed to build the factor-action catalog.

fields.Name: Sonar: Run Intervention
fields.Description: Runs an action-layer intervention: builds an ad-hoc segment + intervention from the operator's current band/score view, splits the cohort into treated/held-back (deterministic holdout), and on commit fires the chosen MJ Action for treated members + records assignments. preview mode returns counts without writing or firing.

fields.Name: ConfigJSON
fields.Description: JSON: { modelId, segment:{name,filter:{bandId,minScore,maxScore}}, intervention:{name,holdoutPercent}, action:{actionId,params:[{name,value}]}, cap, preview }.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { cohortSize, alreadyAssigned, eligible, capped, treated, held, sent, failed, preview }.
Intervention previewed or fired.
ConfigJSON missing or malformed.
The intervention run failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Resource Review Sentiment
fields.Description: Action-backed LLM factor: rates a member's engagement sentiment 0-1 from the prose of a CONFIGURABLE text source — pick a wired data source + its text field(s) in the factor builder — via the 'Sonar: Resource Review Sentiment' AIPrompt. Non-deterministic, external model calls; returns no-data (null) with a reason when no text exists or the model is unavailable.

fields.Name: AnchorRecordID
fields.Description: The anchor record id (member id) to score, injected by the scoring engine.

fields.Name: AsOf
fields.Description: As-of date (ISO), injected by the engine; defaults to now. Only reviews created on or before this date are considered.

fields.Name: Value
fields.Description: Output: engagement sentiment 0-1 (1 = warm/enthusiastic), or null when there is no review text / the model is unavailable.

fields.Name: Explanation
fields.Description: Output: the model's short reason for the score (lands in the explainability waterfall).
Sentiment computed (or no-data returned with a reason).
A required input was missing or invalid.
The sentiment computation failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Create Factor
fields.Description: Creates a declarative factor and binds it into a model's rubric (Model Factor). First write tool of the agentic authoring surface; action-backed factors are authored via Codesmith, not here.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel to add the factor to.

fields.Name: Spec
fields.Description: JSON CreateFactorSpec: name, sourceRelatedEntityID, aggregation, aggregateFieldName, filterExpression, timeWindowID, normalizationMethod, normalizationParamsJSON, higherIsBetter, weight, weightMode.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { factorID, modelFactorID }.
Factor created and bound.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The model was not found.
Saving the factor or binding failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Add Data Source
fields.Description: Wires a related entity into a model as a data source (Model Related Entity, Left join). Agentic authoring tool surface.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel to wire the source into.

fields.Name: Spec
fields.Description: JSON AddDataSourceSpec: relatedEntityID, alias, relationshipPath (optional explicit FK path).

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { modelRelatedEntityID }.
Data source wired.
A required input was missing or invalid.
Saving the data source failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Create Model
fields.Description: Creates a draft ScoreModel (name + anchor entity). Draft by design; publishing is a separate, gated step. Agentic authoring tool surface.

fields.Name: Spec
fields.Description: JSON CreateModelSpec: name, anchorEntityID.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { modelID }.
Draft model created.
A required input was missing or invalid.
Saving the model failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Set Band Set
fields.Description: Points a model at an existing Score Band Set (ScoreModel.BandSetID) so it becomes scoreable. Agentic authoring tool surface.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel to attach the band set to.

fields.Name: BandSetID
fields.Description: The ScoreBandSet to attach.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { modelID, bandSetID }.
Band set attached.
A required input was missing or invalid.
The model was not found.
Saving the model failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Get Prompt
fields.Description: Reads an MJ AIPrompt's editable text (resolved via name → template → active template content) for the factor builder's prompt panel. Returns the text plus the ids the editor needs to save back. Read-only.

fields.Name: PromptName
fields.Description: The registered AIPrompt Name to read (e.g. a factor-action's contract.promptName).

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { promptId, templateContentId, text } (or { error }).
Prompt text returned.
PromptName was missing.
Failed to read the prompt.

fields.Name: Sonar: Update Prompt
fields.Description: Saves edited LLM prompt text from the factor builder onto the AIPrompt's TemplateContent row (by TemplateContentID from Sonar: Get Prompt). NOTE: an AIPrompt is shared — editing affects every factor/use that references it.

fields.Name: TemplateContentID
fields.Description: The MJ Template Content row id whose text to overwrite (from Sonar: Get Prompt).

fields.Name: Text
fields.Description: The new prompt text.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { templateContentId, saved }.
Prompt updated.
TemplateContentID was missing.
Template content row not found.
Failed to save the prompt.

fields.Name: Sonar: Run Authoring Agent
fields.Description: Runs the Sonar Authoring Agent (Loop) server-side via AgentRunner and returns its reply. The seam the Assistant panel calls so the agent runs in MJAPI (where model/LLM/tools live), bypassing the client-side conversation stack. Produces drafts only.

fields.Name: Prompt
fields.Description: The natural-language instruction for the authoring agent.

fields.Name: ContextNote
fields.Description: Optional context (e.g. the model the user is viewing), prepended to the prompt.

fields.Name: Reply
fields.Description: The agent's human-readable summary of what it built.
Agent completed.
A required input was missing.
The authoring agent was not found.
The agent run failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Build Model
fields.Description: Builds a COMPLETE draft model (model + sources + factors + band set) from one spec in a single call — factors reference sources by alias; the action threads the IDs. Use this for building a new model; the granular tools (Create Factor / Add Data Source) are for incremental edits. Draft only.

fields.Name: Spec
fields.Description: JSON BuildModelSpec: { name, anchorEntityID, sources:[{relatedEntityID, alias, relationshipPath?}], factors:[{name, sourceAlias, aggregation, aggregateFieldName?, filterExpression?, timeWindowID?, dateField?, normalizationMethod?, higherIsBetter?, weight?, weightMode?}], bandSetId? }.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { modelID, sources:{alias→id}, factors:[id], bandSetAttached }.
Draft model built.
Spec missing required fields.
A step failed; the partial draft is reported.

fields.Name: Sonar: Describe Model
fields.Description: Reads an existing Sonar model (by ID or name) and returns its resolved config: anchor entity, data sources (alias + entity name), factors (with source alias, aggregation, normalization, weight), and band set. The authoring agent's READ tool so it can answer questions about / suggest changes to a model it can otherwise only write to.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The ScoreModel ID to describe (preferred). Provide this or Name.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: The exact model name to describe (used when ModelID is absent).

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON ModelDescription: { modelID, name, status, anchorEntityID, anchorEntityName, bandSet, sources[], factors[] }.
Model described.
Neither ModelID nor Name was provided.
No model matched the given ID or name.
An unexpected error occurred while reading the model.

fields.Name: Sonar: List Related Entities
fields.Description: Given an anchor entity ID, returns the BUSINESS entities that reference it via a foreign key (the one-to-many data sources Sonar factors aggregate over, e.g. Members <- Event Registrations). Scoped to business schemas (excludes MJ core and the Sonar schema). The authoring agent's READ tool for grounding factor/source suggestions in data that actually exists.

fields.Name: AnchorEntityID
fields.Description: The anchor entity ID to find joinable business sources for.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { anchorEntityID, anchorEntityName, related: [{ entityID, entityName, schemaName, viaField }] }.
Related business entities listed.
AnchorEntityID was missing.
No entity matched the given anchor ID.
An unexpected error occurred while walking the entity graph.

fields.Name: Sonar: Author Factor Action
fields.Description: The §5 escape hatch: when a signal can't be a declarative factor (streaks, decay, sentiment, cross-source ratios), hands a Sonar factor-action brief + the description to the stock ActionSmith agent and returns the Runtime action it authored (CodeApprovalStatus='Pending', a human approves before it scores). ActionSmith is reused untouched.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: The signal to build, in plain English (e.g. 'longest streak of consecutive months with an event registration').

fields.Name: Context
fields.Description: Optional grounding: the anchor entity and available data sources, so the generated code targets real data.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { actionId, approvalStatus, name, message }.
ActionSmith authored a Runtime factor-action (Pending approval).
Description was missing.
The ActionSmith agent is not present in this environment.
ActionSmith did not complete (or errored) — message carries the reason.

fields.Name: Sonar: Start Factor Job
fields.Description: Async kickoff behind the Signal Studio: fires ActionSmith on the Sonar factor brief WITHOUT awaiting it and returns the AgentRunID immediately (via onAgentRunCreated). The run continues server-side; the Studio observes it by polling AIAgentRun.Status. Enables batched, fire-and-forget factor authoring.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: The signal to build, in plain English.

fields.Name: Context
fields.Description: Optional grounding: the anchor entity and available data sources.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { agentRunId } — poll AIAgentRun for status/result.
Job started; AgentRunID returned.
Description was missing.
ActionSmith agent not present in this environment.
The job didn't start.

fields.Name: Sonar: Refine Factor Action
fields.Description: AI 'improve this signal' loop behind the Signal Studio: fires ActionSmith with the current code + the reviewer's feedback (async, like the commission flow), then transplants the improved+self-tested code back onto the ORIGINAL signal (→ Pending for re-review) and disables the agent's scratch row. The approval gate is never bypassed.

fields.Name: TargetActionID
fields.Description: The existing signal (Runtime action) to improve.

fields.Name: Feedback
fields.Description: What to change or improve, in plain English.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { agentRunId } — poll AIAgentRun for status; the signal updates in place when it completes.
Refine job started; AgentRunID returned.
TargetActionID or Feedback was missing.
Target action or ActionSmith agent not found.
The refine job didn't start.

fields.Name: Sonar: Unpublish Model
fields.Description: Moves a published model (Active/Paused) back to Draft so it can be edited. SAFE direction only — never publishes or activates. Lets the Authoring Agent unlock a model the user asked to edit instead of dead-ending on the lock.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: The model to unpublish (preferred). Provide this or ModelName.

fields.Name: ModelName
fields.Description: Exact model name, if the ID isn't known.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { modelID, name, previousStatus, status }.
Model unpublished to Draft (or already Draft).
Neither ModelID nor ModelName was provided.
No model matched the identifier.
Unpublish failed or the model is in a non-unpublishable state.

fields.Name: Sonar: Find Entities
fields.Description: Resolves a business entity NAME to its ID (and lists candidate anchors), scoped to business schemas (MJ/Sonar system schemas hidden). Lets the Authoring Agent get an anchorEntityID for a new model instead of dead-ending on a raw UUID. Read-only.

fields.Name: NameQuery
fields.Description: Case-insensitive substring of the entity name. Omit to list all business entities.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { entities: [{ id, name, schemaName, description }], count, truncated }.
Returned matching business entities.
Lookup failed.

fields.Name: Sonar: Find Models
fields.Description: Resolves a score model by PARTIAL name (and lists existing models) → id/name/status/anchor. Lets the Authoring Agent fuzzy-match a vague model reference and enumerate models, instead of needing a near-exact name for Describe Model. Read-only.

fields.Name: NameQuery
fields.Description: Case-insensitive substring of the model name. Omit to list all models.

fields.Name: Result
fields.Description: JSON: { models: [{ id, name, status, anchorEntityID, anchorName }], count, truncated }.
Returned matching models.
Lookup failed.
